CustomField.description: This is to indicate that this Account (typically Payer Account) has the "Deal" flag on it in SAP. (This is set through Automation, users can not edit value)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is to indicate that this Account (typically Payer Account) has the "Deal" flag on it in SAP. (This is set through Automation, users can not edit value)
CustomField.label: SAP Has Deal
